differential_diagnoses: Obesity hypoventilation syndrome (OHS) with obstructive sleep apnea
next_steps: Serum protein electrophoresis (SPEP) and immunofixation with serum free light chains
Acetylcholine receptor (AChR) and anti-MuSK antibody testing
Echocardiogram with strain pattern analysis to assess for infiltrative cardiomyopathy
Polysomnography to evaluate for OHS and sleep-disordered breathing
Repetitive nerve stimulation (RNS) and needle electromyography (EMG)
Lumbar puncture for cerebrospinal fluid analysis
Cardiac MRI if amyloidosis is suspected
